comments.name: Briva
comments.text: Finally got around to reading something on your blog! I do really like how it's laid out. As for your experiences, I'm giving sending you an astral projection of a hug. It's fucking rough out here buddy. Pretty sure I'm just gonna give up on tech soon and learn to be a barista or something. ¯\_(ツ)_/¯

comments.name: ed
comments.text: Hey, I'm in this. I think writing out your own experience (as a very competent, detail-oriented, and social guy) in the tech field is going to be very helpful for a lot of people (and cathartic). Easy to read and easy to enjoy as always. Good work and good luck in the future. :)
